hero.badge: #1 Freemium Fitness App · Start free, upgrade when you're ready
hero.body: Routines generated by intelligent algorithms, precision nutrition and a community that pushes you further. Everything you need to build the body — and the life — you want.

expansion.label: Environment is everything
expansion.subtitle: Every feature was designed with one goal: making your progress inevitable.

features.label: What you get
features.subtitle: Six powerful tools, one platform. Built by athletes, for athletes.

items.title: Routine Generator
items.desc: Answer 7 smart questions. Get a personalized weekly plan built for your body, goals and equipment.

items.title: Precision Nutrition
items.desc: TDEE calculator, macro tracking across 142 ingredients, 7-day meal planner and recipe creator.

items.title: Weight Tracking
items.desc: Track your progress with beautiful charts, trend analysis and weekly streaks that keep you consistent.

items.title: Community Challenges
items.desc: Compete in leaderboards, earn XP, unlock achievements and share your wins with the community.

items.title: Gamification & XP
items.desc: Level up from Novice to Legend. Every logged workout and maintained streak has real rewards.

items.title: Optimal Timing
items.desc: Science-backed nutrition planner — knows exactly what to eat before and after every session.

preview.label: App preview
preview.subtitle: Weight, macros, routines and XP — everything that matters on one screen. Clean. Fast. No distractions.

shader.label: Technology that works for you
shader.subtitle: Smart algorithms that learn from your body, your habits and your goals to give you the most precise recommendations on the market.

testimonials.label: Real results
testimonials.subtitle: Real people. Real transformations. Zero excuses.

items.name: Carlos M.
items.quote: I lost 18 kg in 4 months using the routine generator and nutrition tracker. This app replaced three paid subscriptions. Incredible value.

items.name: Ana R.
items.quote: The routines completely transformed my training. In 12 weeks I went from beginner to competing in my first powerlifting meet. The community kept me going.

items.name: David L.
items.quote: Finally a fitness app that respects my time. The planner automatically syncs with my macros and the supplement guide is evidence-based.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free with full access to core features. Pro and Elite remove ads and add advanced analytics tools that separate those who progress from those who plateau.

plans.desc: Everything you need to start — no card, no commitment.
Ad-free, with AI tools and analytics for athletes who mean it.
Elite-level analysis for competitive athletes, coaches, and those who refuse to plateau.

cta.label: The moment is now
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of athletes already training smarter. No gym required. No excuses accepted.

footer.tagline: Built with ❤️ for athletes who mean business
